headlines.description: Harry Kane scored a hat trick in Bayern Munich's 8-1 demolition of Mainz on Saturday to set a Bundesliga record as the champions cut the gap on leaders Bayer Leverkusen to seven points.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane hat trick helps Bayern thrash Mainz 8-1

video.headline: Harry Kane scores hat trick as Bayern thrash Mainz

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Harry Kane scores hat trick as Bayern thrash Mainz) 2024/03/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: Ten-man Borussia Dortmund eked out a 2-1 win at Werder Bremen to hold on to fourth spot in the Bundesliga on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sancho's 1st goal back at Dortmund seals win

video.headline: Donyell Malen's acrobatic volley puts Dortmund ahead
